title: Gantt to mirror main table sequence and not arrange by timeline sequence

posts.author: ziyu_chan (Ziyu Chan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Gantt to mirror main table sequence and not arrange by timeline sequence. Required an ability to reorder views in gantt chart.

What are you trying to achieve

Ability to mirror main table sequence in Gantt chart view.

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Gantt charts are usually aligned in timeline. Do you want to be able to arrange the Gantt manually (like dragging & dropping item bars), so you don’t have to rely on setting up dates? Or is it something else?

SolDevelo - we build apps you can trust.
